headline: Wildstone•3K followers
summary: Experienced Managing Director with a demonstrated history of working in the marketing and advertising industry. Skilled in Outdoor Advertising, Advertising Sales,leadership and management . Strong business development.

experiences.title: Managing Director
experiences.description: Specailsts in the acquisition and development of outdoor advertising sites accross the uk. Large format poster sites or billboards are our profession with vast knowledge and experince. We generate revenue for land owners by positioning advertising sites upon land or buildings. Our prominent advertising sites benefit business and brands by bringing messages to huge roadside audiences.

experiences.title: Director
experiences.description: We were specialists in the acquisition of billboards throughout the united kingdom. Our Company enjoyed very healthy and enjoyable working relationships with many corporate clients,including. Punch taverns, Enterprise Inns ,Scottish and Newcastle, national tyres, HSS HIre group. In 2008 I decided to venture out on my own and formed Space Outdoor Ltd.
